sections.paragraph:
Μελίτη, ης, ἡ Malta, an island located south of Sicily (M. is attested as the name of this island in Diod S 15, 12, 2; Strabo 6, 2, 11; 17, 3, 16; Ps.-Scylax 94 [p. 37 BFabricius 1878]; ins) Ac 28:1.—On debate respecting identification w. Mijet, off the Dalmatian coast (among the first in modern times AAcworth, JTS 24, ’73, 190–93) and Cephallenia (Warnecke, Romfahrt 59–69; 145–56) s. BRapske, BAFCS II 36–43.—AMayr, D. Insel Malta im Altertum 1909; Zahn, AG 841–44; JvonFreeden, Malta u. die Baukunst seiner Megalith-Tempel ’93; Pauly-W. XV 543ff; Kl. Pauly III 1179; DAC X 1320ff; BHHW II 1132f; OEANE III 402–5.—Boffo, Iscrizioni no. 22. M-M.

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Strabo Strabo , I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Ps. Ps. = pseudo, pseudonymous

Scylax Scylax , s. Ps.-Scylax; V–IVb.c.—List 5

ins Ins, ins = Inscription, Inschrift, inscription(s). Without a period, esp. in lists, as at the beginning of entries; the capitalized form is used in titles. In conjunction with literary works this abbr. refers to the title or description of contents.

JTS JTS = Journal of Theological Studies—List 6

Warnecke, Romfahrt Warnecke, Romfahrt = HW., Die tatsächliche Romfahrt des Apostels Paulus—List 6

BAFCS BAFCS = The Book of Acts in Its First Century Setting—List 6

Zahn Zahn = TZ., various works—List 6

AG AG = Apostelgeschichte (in German titles relating to Acts)

Pauly-W Pauly-W = AP./GW., Real-Encyclopädie der klassischen Altertumswissenschaft—List 6

Kl. Pauly Kl. Pauly = Der Kleine Pauly: Lexikon der Antike—List 6

BHHW BHHW = Biblisch-historisches Handwörterbuch—List 6

OEANE OEANE = Oxford Encyclopedia of Archaeology in the Near East—List 6

Boffo, Iscrizioni Boffo, Iscrizioni = LB., Iscrizioni greche e latine—List 3

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 627
